generated_exposure.exposure_text: As we've seen in recent conflicts, underfunded defense budgets lead to tragic consequences. Our allies are increasing their spending - it's time we do the same to ensure our military can respond effectively to emerging threats. Cutting corners on defense isn't just about dollars; it's about the safety of our families and the security of our nation. Let's make sure our troops have what they need to deter aggression and protect our interests worldwide. #NationalSecurity #DefenseBudget
